assets.name: SUSE Brand Design Tokens
assets.description: Canonical SUSE brand tokens (DTCG). The colour picker's swatches and brand-bound input defaults resolve from here. Penpot/Tokens-Studio compatible; generated by scripts/build-brand-tokens.js.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Horizontal Green (on dark)
assets.description: Green SUSE logo, horizontal (wide) lockup, for placement on dark backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Horizontal White (on dark)
assets.description: White SUSE logo, horizontal (wide) lockup, for placement on dark backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Horizontal Green (on light)
assets.description: Green SUSE logo, horizontal (wide) lockup, for placement on light backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Horizontal Black (on light)
assets.description: Black SUSE logo, horizontal (wide) lockup, for placement on light backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Vertical Green (on dark)
assets.description: Green SUSE logo, vertical (stacked, near-square) lockup, for placement on dark backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Vertical White (on dark)
assets.description: White SUSE logo, vertical (stacked, near-square) lockup, for placement on dark backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Vertical Green (on light)
assets.description: Green SUSE logo, vertical (stacked, near-square) lockup, for placement on light backgrounds.

assets.name: SUSE Logo — Vertical Black (on light)
assets.description: Black SUSE logo, vertical (stacked, near-square) lockup, for placement on light backgrounds.

assets.name: Pulse Rings
assets.description: Concentric SUSE-green rings that scale up and fade out in a staggered pulse. 4s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Loader Dots
assets.description: Three dots — green, pine, green — bouncing in a staggered wave. 3.2s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Bar Sweep
assets.description: A rounded SUSE-green bar easing back and forth along a faint pine track — a progress motif. 3.2s loop, transparent background.

assets.name: Icon Duo Themes
assets.description: Colour pairings for themable two-colour icons (c1 accent / c2 base).
